issues.description: Trigger should be 'Permanent' or similar (not 'Activated'). This is a static ability that applies as long as the condition is met, not an activated ability.
Action should be a protection mechanic (e.g., 'GiveKeyword' with 'CannotBeKOedInBattle' or equivalent), not 'Banish'. The card text states 'cannot be K.O.'d in battle', not any banish effect.
Duration should be 'Permanent' (not 'EndOfTurn'). This is a persistent static ability while the condition is met.
Condition 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The card requires '[DON!! x1]' as cost/requirement, which should be 'HasAttachedDon' (at least 1 attached DON) or similar board state, not resting DON.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle.
